name: The Scorched Descent
description: A fault in the floor of the Forge-Heart gapes wide where the world boss once thrashed against its chains of stone, and a stair of fused, glassy steps spirals down into a darkness that the molten light above cannot reach. The air cools as it falls, but it carries a wrongness the fire never had: a greasy, sulphurous reek and the faint after-smell of burnt hair. Whatever Pyraxis was, it left something of itself scarred into the deep rock here.
ambient_messages: A draught of cold, sour air climbs the stair from below and gutters the last of the forge-light.
One of the glassy steps ticks and splinters underfoot, and the crack echoes down into the dark for a long time.
Far beneath you something exhales, slow and rasping, and the smell of scorched hair thickens.
